description_long: This is a metallic briefcase with a ribbed, silver-gray exterior and reinforced edges, giving it a sturdy and secure appearance. The case is adorned with several U.S. dollar bills, some partially tucked into the seams and others lying flat on the top surface, suggesting it is filled with cash. The front features a prominent, robust handle and a central latch mechanism, both made of metal, designed for secure carrying and closure. The briefcase's corners are reinforced with darker metallic caps, enhancing durability and impact resistance. The overall design is sleek and professional, typical of cases used for transporting valuables or sensitive documents. No visible brand logos or external pockets are present on the exterior.
description: A sturdy, metallic briefcase with a ribbed silver-gray finish, reinforced corners, and cash visibly protruding from its seams.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main handle, central latch, and several dollar bills sticking out from the front seam.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed texture, reinforced corners, and cash protruding from the side seam.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel with more dollar bills visible in the seam and reinforced corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ribbed surface, reinforced corners, and cash sticking out from the seam.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed, U-shaped metal handle attached to the front with metal brackets; rigid and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Central metal latch lock located above the handle; appears to be a mechanical latch, no visible keyhole or combination dial.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Dark metallic corner caps on all corners, rounded and covering the edges for impact protection.
